title: Medical device data platform
abstract: Example medical device data platforms are disclosed herein. In an example, the platform may include at least one integration device to access information originating from a plurality of implantable medical devices manufactured by a plurality of manufacturers and implanted in a plurality of patients. The system may also include an information processor to process the accessed information to generate at least one of patient-oriented information and provider-oriented information. The system may also include at least one communication device providing at least one of a patient portal and a provider portal to provide the patient-oriented information and the provider-oriented information, respectively.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A medical device data platform comprising: at least one integration device configured to access information originating from a plurality of implantable medical devices manufactured by a plurality of manufacturers and implanted in a plurality of patients; an information processor comprising at least one hardware processor, the information processor configured to process the accessed information to generate at least one of patient-oriented information and provider-oriented information; and at least one communication device providing at least one of: a patient portal configured to provide, to each of the plurality of patients, at least a portion of the patient-oriented information corresponding to at least one of the plurality of implantable medical devices associated with the patient; and a provider portal configured to provide, to each of a plurality of care providers, at least a portion of the provider-oriented information corresponding to at least one of the plurality of implantable medical devices associated with a patient of the care provider. 2. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein at least one of the patient-oriented information and the provider-oriented information comprises biological response data of at least one of the plurality of patients. 3. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein at least one of the patient-oriented information and the provider-oriented information comprises a technical status of at least one of the plurality of implantable medical devices. 4. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein at least one of the patient-oriented information and the provider-oriented information comprises recall information corresponding to at least one of the plurality of implantable medical devices. 5. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein the information processor is further configured to provide an interface for scheduling appointments for at least one of the plurality of patients associated with at least one of the plurality of care providers. 6. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein the provider- oriented information comprises at least one recommended change to a workflow of at least one of the plurality of care providers. 7. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein the information processor is further configured to provide an interface for at least one of the plurality of care providers to enter clinical actions taken with respect to at least one of the plurality of implantable medical devices, to receive information regarding changes in current billing codes related to the at least one of the plurality of implantable medical devices, and to generate those of the current billing codes representing the clinical actions. 8. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein the at least one integration device is configured to access the information originating from the plurality of implantable medical devices via a communication network from the plurality of implantable medical devices. 9. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein the at least one integration device is configured to access the information originating from the plurality of implantable medical devices via a communication network from a manufacturer platform of at least one manufacturer of the plurality of implantable medical devices. 10. The medical device data platform of claim 1, wherein the information processor is further configured to update electronic medical records of at least one of the 

 plurality of patients with at least one of the patient-oriented information and the provider- oriented information.
